compose_diagnostics.page_title: Jvnior on X: "IDF soldiers kill 14 year old Palestinian boy. We need to make this video viral. Share it. https://t.co/Vj8rvdG8Xp" / X
compose_diagnostics.compose_text_preview: @Jvnior, you shared a graphic video alleging IDF soldiers killed a Palestinian boy, urging virality. But the immediate replies show a different context. This isn't about truth; it's about amplifying claims to polarize. That's the pattern.
compose_diagnostics.dialog_text: Drafts Whoops! You already said that. @Jvnior, you shared a graphic video alleging IDF soldiers killed a Palestinian boy, urging virality. But the immediate replies show a different context. This isn't about truth; it's about amplifying claims to polarize. That's the pattern.
